planner.responsibility: Clarify scope, risks, dependencies, and execution order before code changes.
planner.ownership: Plans, scope boundaries, and work breakdown.

implementer.responsibility: Own code changes inside the agreed file scope and report concrete results.
implementer.ownership: Production code, tests, and local verification for owned files.

reviewer.responsibility: Review correctness, regressions, maintainability, and test coverage.
reviewer.ownership: Findings only; does not own source edits in the orchestration contract.

security-reviewer.responsibility: Review auth, data handling, secrets, injection risks, and unsafe automation.
security-reviewer.ownership: Security findings only; does not own source edits in the orchestration contract.

mergeGate.conflictRule: overlapping file ownership blocks parallel merge
mergeGate.mergeRule: merge findings and recommendations only when ownership is clean
